title: Daily Briefing — Mar 27
headline: Extreme fear, tech breaks down, energy takes the wheel—flows say patience, react, don’t predict.
body: Right, big picture: Volatility is mental, VIX up at 29.37 (well above its 20 MA), and the market’s in extreme fear mode (Fear & Greed at 17). SPY, QQQ, and most majors have closed solidly below their 20 MAs (SPY: 645.09 vs 20 MA: 667.21), so rule 6 is in force—exit longs or stay defensive. This isn’t a nibble-the-dip environment, it’s a protect capital environment.

Sector rotation is clear: Energy (XLE $61.52) and Materials (XLB $49.09) are leading while Technology (XLK $132.50, lagging with HIGH sector risk) is getting smashed. XLE and Materials both above all MAs, momentum solid, flows are positive; meanwhile tech is breaking down across the board (META -8.0%, NVDA -4.2%, MSFT -1.4%). If you’re still chasing tech—you’re trading against both flows and rotation.

Contrarian angle: Extreme Fear (FGI at 17) is historically a buy zone, but don’t rush in—price hasn’t signaled mean reversion yet, and VIX regime is HIGH. Financials (XLF $49.05) are approaching breakdown—canary alert. Watch for dark pool stabilisation or sector bottoming before stepping back in, and don’t fight the flows, especially with retail panic still unwinding. Patience, react, don’t predict.
callout_body:
SPY: 645.09 (well below 20 MA 667.21) – Defensive stance
QQQ: 573.79 (below 20 MA 597.29) – Watch, no long triggers
XLE: 61.52 (above all MAs) – Sector leadership
XLK: 132.50 (bear bias, lagging) – Avoid tech for now
XLF: 49.05 (approaching 20 MA 49.69) – Watch for breakdown
VIX: 29.37 (> SMA20 25.28, high regime) – Vol stay elevated
FGI: 17 – Extreme Fear, opportunity soon but not yet
action_items: Move defensive on tech—watch for dark pool signals at NVDA, META, XLK lows, but don’t chase.
Monitor energy/industrials leaders (XLE $61.52, XLI $161.27)—rotational trades only if flows hold positive.
closing_quote: If it’s in the press, it’s in the price. Abundance mindset—next trade, not this one.
